title: stemonoporus oblongifolius
intro: Stemonoporus oblongifolius, also known as the Kalakal or Kalabanda, is a species of tree found in the Western Ghats of India, belonging to the family Stemonuraceae. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Stemonoporus oblongifolius include treating various health issues such as fever, skin conditions, and digestive problems, as well as possessing anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, the bark and leaves of the plant are used to make decoctions, infusions, and powders, which are used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
